name: golang-github-pmezard-go-difflib-dev
title: golang-github-pmezard-go-difflib-dev
summary: partial port of Python difflib package to Go
description:
partial port of Python difflib package to Go
Go-difflib is a partial port of Python 3 difflib package. Its main goal
was to make unified and context diff available in pure Go, mostly for
testing purposes.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-pmezard-go-difflib-dev because partial port of Python difflib package to Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-pmezard-go-difflib-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-pmezard-go-difflib-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-pmezard-go-difflib-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
